case_title: JAPAN ELECTRONIC et al VS CHAN, GARY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAPAN ELECTRONIC AZAR, MOHAMAD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAN, GARY FOTO DEPO JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23305 ON 7-21-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
